---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.omega-hero}
# The Omega Institute

::: {.equation}
x² = x + 1
:::

::: {.subtitle}
From one equation, everything follows. AI-driven mathematical discovery with 10,588+ machine-verified theorems.
:::
:::

::: {.stats-bar}
::: {.stat-item}
::: {.number}
10,588+
:::
::: {.label}
Machine-Verified Theorems
:::
:::

::: {.stat-item}
::: {.number}
17
:::
::: {.label}
Research Papers
:::
:::

::: {.stat-item}
::: {.number}
9
:::
::: {.label}
Journal Submissions
:::
:::

::: {.stat-item}
::: {.number}
11
:::
::: {.label}
Lean 4 Modules
:::
:::
:::

---

::: {.track-grid}

::: {.track-card}
## The Science

Rigorous mathematical research derived from a single algebraic constraint. Every theorem machine-verified in Lean 4, every result traceable back to the seed equation.

**Generation 2** --- Pure mathematics from x² = x + 1: symbolic dynamics, number theory, ergodic theory, spectral analysis. 9 papers submitted to international journals.

**Generation 1** --- Quantum cellular automata and foundational physics: information geometry, cosmological phase transitions, emergent relativity. 8 papers targeting Nature Communications, JHEP, PRL.

[Browse the Science →](science/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.track-card}
## The Interpretation

How does x² = x + 1 illuminate the structure hidden in classical texts? From the I Ching's 64 hexagrams (a 6-bit binary encoding where the golden-mean shift selects exactly 21 valid states) to the Tao Te Ching's "道生一，一生二，二生三，三生万物" (one equation generating recursive multiplicity), the same mathematical constraint appears across millennia of human thought.

This is not metaphor. These are formal structural correspondences, analyzed with the same rigor we bring to our proofs.

**Complete:** 道德经 12-category Omega mapping analysis | 易经 12-category hexagram-algebra structural analysis

[Explore Interpretations →](cultural/index.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## How It Works

The Omega Project starts with one equation: **x² = x + 1**. This polynomial defines the golden ratio, but more importantly, it constrains a symbolic dynamical system --- the **golden-mean shift** --- where no two consecutive 1s can appear.

From this single constraint, we systematically derive what mathematically *must* follow:

1. **Fibonacci growth** emerges from counting valid words
2. **Zeckendorf representation** gives every integer a unique decomposition
3. **Ring arithmetic** modulo Fibonacci numbers creates algebraic structure
4. **Spectral theory** governs asymptotic behavior through collision kernels
5. **A modular tower** converges to a profinite limit, analogous to p-adic integers

Every step is machine-verified in [Lean 4](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath). Zero axioms beyond core logic.

---

## Links

- [Automath Engine (GitHub)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath) --- the core Lean 4 formalization
- [Chrono AI](https://www.chrono-ai.fun/) --- the company behind the research
- [Twitter/X](https://x.com/ChronoAI_HQ) --- latest updates
